title: College Dorm Tour 2021 | Eastern Michigan University
body: I am Hasin Ahmed. I am a fall 23 applicant at EMU. They accepted me with their scholarship program. My intended major is Electrical and Computer Engineering.
author: @hasinahmed3343

title: Eastern Michigan University - Full Episode | The College Tour
body: As an Eastern alum, that place turned me into a man. I will cherish my time at Eastern forever! 😢
author: @ProducerTSS

title: Eastern Michigan University - Full Episode | The College Tour
body: I’m going fall 2025! GoEagles ( I was going to attend fall 2024, but due to money issues, I couldn’t attend)
author: @ByronScott-m2o

title: Eastern Michigan University - Full Episode | The College Tour
body: My alma mater.  I didnt graduate until my late 20s.  I was a late bloomer...But, my life is 10 times better now.  I went on to a successful career in Information systems.  No more dead end jobs!  Great school for people like me.
author: @210milesfromnowhere

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Michigan #college #universityofmichigan
body: As someone who lives in Ann Arbor (pray to god i get into UM) I love seeing these videos, it's crazy seeing places I go to all the time on a random video online.
author: @nexus8407

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Michigan #college #universityofmichigan
body: I don’t know a single student here at umich who lives like that every day. Y’all most of us out at here at umich are on the edge like everyone else lmao
author: @miriamhalpern3026

title: A Day in the Life at the University of Michigan #college #universityofmichigan
body: This is the happy pinky life of central campus folks mainly art, Business and Med school 😂 NOW, hi 👋 a day as an Aerospace engineering major at the University of Michigan, I wake up everyday mad at Michigan and the schizophrenic shit weather , I rush to brush my teeth and get a Tim’s coffee, at this point my blood is already 85% caffeine since I haven’t slept the night before, then I have to head to North Campus, I live in Ypsilanti ( only business and fashion majors can afford living in Ann Arbor “the charm of privilege” ) which is 20 mins give or take, then I attend classes that kill every brain cell in my head, then after fighting with EECs I finish the day coked up on the biggest number of energy drinks just so I can power through my night part time work… COLLEGE IS HELLA FUN I am so excited for the next adventure 🙂‍↕️
author: @dukephantomx

title: College Move-in Day Vlog 2020 |Eastern Michigan University Sellers Hall
body: I am a junior at EMU. I didn’t move back to campus this year but my first year I lived in Sellers. The memories, I miss campus. I hope you are doing well, stay safe!
